views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's latest mood as a large emoji-enhanced indicator, weekly sparkline trend, streak counter with flame icon, energy-mood mini correlation, and a prominent quick check-in FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick mood check-in modal with a 1-10 slider that maps to emoji faces, secondary energy and anxiety sliders, activity and social context chip pickers, and an expandable journal notes text area

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable date-grouped timeline of mood entries with color-coded mood indicators (red-yellow-green gradient), activity icon badges, and filter chips for activity type and mood range

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep insights dashboard: 30-day mood trend line chart with rolling average overlay, mood-by-activity horizontal bar chart, day-of-week pattern radar, mood distribution histogram, and dynamically generated insight cards with actionable recommendations

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayLatestMood
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most recent mood rating logged today, nil if no entry yet — drives the large dashboard mood indicator

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntryCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of mood check-ins recorded today, shown as badge on dashboard

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating across all entries in the current week (Monday through Sunday)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekMoodAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating for the prior week, used as baseline for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodTrendDirection
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compares weeklyMoodAverage vs previousWeekMoodAverage: up if >= 0.5 higher, down if >= 0.5 lower, stable otherwise

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive calendar days with at least one mood entry, counting backwards from today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time best consecutive-day journaling streak for milestone celebrations

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood for each day of the current week, used for dashboard sparkline and analytics line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyMoodChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood for each day of the current month, main analytics chart data source

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Frequency count of each mood rating 1-10 across all entries, rendered as histogram in analytics

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageMoodByActivity
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating grouped by activity type sorted descending — reveals which activities correlate with better moods

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageMoodByDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood per day of week (1=Sunday through 7=Saturday) to identify weekly rhythm patterns

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageMoodBySocialContext
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood grouped by social context to reveal how social situations affect emotional state

viewModelComputedProperties.name: energyMoodCorrelation
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Pearson correlation coefficient between energy level and mood rating across all entries, range -1 to 1

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodVolatility
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Standard deviation of mood ratings over the past 7 days — high values may indicate emotional instability or stress

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily journaling goal met: 1.0 if at least one entry today, 0.0 otherwise

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insightsList
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamically generated insight cards based on detected patterns: best activity, worst day, streak milestones, trend alerts, volatility warnings, social correlations

dailyGoal.description: Log at least one mood check-in per day to maintain streak and build emotional awareness habit

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if it has at least one mood entry. Streak is consecutive calendar days with entries, broken by any day with zero entries. Milestone celebrations at 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 180, and 365 days.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current week average mood to previous week average, show percentage change and directional arrow. Track 30-day rolling average vs prior 30 days for longer-term trend. Flag significant drops (>1.5 points week-over-week) as urgent alerts. Calculate mood volatility (stddev) and flag weeks with stddev > 2.5 as high-variability periods.
insights: Activity correlation: 'You feel happiest when doing {activity} (avg {x}/10) — try to do it more often'
Day-of-week pattern: 'Your mood tends to dip on {weekday}s (avg {x}/10) — consider planning something enjoyable'
Energy-mood link: 'Higher energy days correlate with {x}% better mood — prioritize sleep and movement'
Social insight: 'You rate {x} points higher when with {socialContext} vs alone'
Streak milestone: 'Amazing! {n}-day journaling streak — consistency builds self-awareness'
Volatility alert: 'Your mood varied by {stddev} points this week — high variability may signal stress'
Anxiety pattern: 'Your anxiety spikes on {weekday}s — your mood averages {x} points lower on high-anxiety days'
Trend alert: 'Your mood has been trending {direction} over the past 2 weeks ({delta} point change)'
